caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a wall of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears a plain white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone, mounted on a boom arm with the text " Rode NT1-A" visible on its body, is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. While he remains relatively still in the first few frames, he begins to move his right arm more dynamically, ending with a blurred motion of his hand as he gestures emphatically during his speech. He maintains a focused expression, looking slightly off-camera as he speaks into the microphone.
